steps.text: Identify the key phrase: the service can clean at most 14 places per day. "At most" means the total cannot exceed 14 — it can equal 14 but not go higher. This translates to $\le$.
Build the expression for total places: offices plus homes = $f + h$. Applying the constraint: $f + h \le 14$.

Evaluate all choices:
  • A: $f+h\le14$ — total places is at most 14. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: $f+h\ge14$ — says total is at least 14, meaning the service must clean 14 or more. This contradicts "at most." Eliminated.
  • C: $f-h\le14$ — uses subtraction instead of addition. The number of offices minus homes is unrelated to the daily capacity constraint. Eliminated.
  • D: $f-h\ge14$ — subtraction with the wrong direction. Eliminated.
